case_title: EDDY AND HYDE PARTNERSHIP vs. KAILIHIWA, HAROLD et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EDDY AND HYDE PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT KAILIHIWA, HAROLD DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE KINCH, CARLOS SUMMONS ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EDDY AND HYDE PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAILIHIWA, HAROLD KINCH, CARLOS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 481 EDDY ST #4, LEASE FORFEITED
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED HEREIN AS DOE 1 TO BE KINCH, CARLOS

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EDDY AND HYDE PARTNERSHIP SERVED OCT-04-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KINCH, CARLOS
